Document:
[color=#897236][mono]──── [color=#FFA500][bold]300 SERIES: SHIP[/bold][/color] ───────────────────────────────[/mono][/color]
[head=3][color=#FFA500]Misdemeanor[/color][/head]
Code
Name
Description
Punishment
TS-301
Evading Law Enforcement
For a Ship to knowingly after being hailed, avoid being approached by a security or TDF ship for whatever purposes.
10,000 credits fine OR up to 10 minutes of imprisonment.
TS-302
Traffic Noncompliance
For a Ship to enter into a location of which they have been forbidden or have not received prior approval. Such as but not limited to, docking to stations or entering No Fly Zones. First should be a warning from the Station traffic controller.
5,000 credits fine OR up to 10 minutes of imprisonment.
TS-303
Dock Loitering
For a Ship to remain docked to a port after it has been requested to depart from it by the Station's Traffic Controller or Enforcer.
2,500 credits fine OR up to 10 minutes of imprisonment.
\n
[head=3][color=#FFA500]Felony[/color][/head]
Code
Name
Description
Punishment
TS-304
Ship Possession
For a Ship to be in unauthorized possession of a Class 2 or below restricted item outlined by the [textlink="contraband list" link="SLContrabandList"].
30,000 credits fine OR up to 20 minutes of imprisonment, and confiscation of contraband.
TS-305
Reckless Flight
To operate a Ship in a reckless manner that creates an unreasonable risk of collision, injury, or disruption to other vessels, stations, or Sector operations.
25,000 credits fine OR up to 20 minutes of imprisonment.
\n
[head=3][color=#FFA500]Grand Felony[/color][/head]
Code
Name
Description
Punishment
TS-306
Grand Ship Possession
For a Ship to be in unauthorized possession of a Class 3 restricted item outlined by the [textlink="contraband list" link="SLContrabandList"].
60,000 credits fine OR up to 40 minutes of imprisonment, and confiscation of contraband.
TS-307
Smuggling
For a Ship to be operating as a means of moving contraband from one location to another, or to serve as a location to dispense or obtain contraband from.
75,000 credits fine OR up to 20 minutes of imprisonment, and confiscation of restricted cargo.
\n
[head=3][color=#FFA500]Capital[/color][/head]
Code
Name
Description
Punishment
TS-308
Ship to Ship Destruction
For a Ship to maliciously commit an act through the use of armaments or ramming that, directly or indirectly, renders another vessel or its part uninhabitable or inoperable without due permission of the Ship's Captain.
Execution, mandatory cryogenic imprisonment, or permanent confinement.
